get_changfan_failed: Failed to get venue sales information: {message}
have_changfan_msg: This project has venue sales items
select_changfan: Please select the venue sales item to purchase
error_occurred:
An error occurred
Please contact the developer and provide the log in the logs directory and TraceId: {trace}
select_sku_not_complete: Ticket information selection is incomplete, please go back and select
unsupported_order_type_warining: Warning: Currently only supports the most normal projects. Any discount, group purchase and other ticket types are temporarily not supported
select_pay_money: Please confirm the order amount (in fen, manually modify if there are discounts, shipping fees, etc.)
id_type_taiwan: Taiwan Resident Travel Permit to Mainland
select_after_success_action: Select action after successful ticket purchase
id_type_hk_macau: Hong Kong/Macau Resident Travel Permit to Mainland
select_buyer_not_complete: Buyer selection not completed, please go back and select
have_sales_dates_msg: This project has purchase date selection
not_recommend_exit_force: Reminder: We do not recommend directly clicking the top-right exit button, as it may prevent proper cache cleanup and fill up temporary disk space. To exit, please use the main menu or Ctrl-C
timezone_recommended: We recommend using UTC+8 (Asia/Shanghai) timezone to avoid unnecessary issues
not_followed: You haven't followed the streamer yet~
follow_success: Follow successful! Thank you for your support nya~
old_follower: You are an old fan / mutual follow~ Special permission for you nya~
wait_until_sale_start: Waiting for sale to start, remaining {time} minutes
gaia_sms_mo_confirm: Please confirm SMS has been sent
gaia_biliword_not_supported: biliword is not supported yet... Good luck if you encounter it
gaia_type_not_supported: This risk control verification type is not supported
sale_start_time_not_found: Sale start time not found, please pay attention to the time yourself
gaia_img_verify_code: Please enter the popup image captcha
sale_not_started_warning: Warning: The current session has not started sales yet. Placing an order may cause this account to be unable to purchase tickets by any means within 5 minutes after sales start. Please confirm whether to continue!!!!!
no_buyer: No buyer information, please add in Member Purchase
change_order_interval_warning:
Warning: The following operations may increase the risk of risk control. Please ensure you understand the risks. We only recommend changing this value in the following cases:
1. Continuous grabbing time does not exceed 1 minute (e.g. at the very beginning)
2. Many 5s shields, no need to add extra interval
3. Multiple instances on same IP need multiplier adjustment
If you confirm, enter the interval value below (unit: milliseconds). Recommended default is 300ms.
confirm_to_order: Please confirm the information to enter the ticket grabbing process (countdown)
buyer_uid_not_match: Buyer UID does not match, possibly due to account switch, please reconfigure
bark_enhanced: Enable enhanced mode? (Will ignore Do Not Disturb and silent mode, ring repeatedly at maximum volume)
bark_server: Bark server (default is fine if no special needs)
run_command_command: Please enter the command to run
ob11_server: OneBot v11 forward HTTP API endpoint (must include http(s)://)
run_command_help: Warning: Only use if you know what you are doing. This is for advanced users. Add a command suitable for your OS. You can include the preset `ORDER_ID` and it will be automatically replaced with the real order ID.
hot_project_no_token: Hot project, no risk control parameters generated, high chance of risk control / post-settlement
qrcode_generate_failed: Failed to display QR code, please pay on mobile: {error}
scan_qrcode_to_pay: Please scan the QR code or pay on mobile
session_not_found: No matching login session found, please login again
maybe_violated: You may be a victim of pirated software. The only official release channel: https://github.com/biliticket/BHYG
captcha_not_available: Captcha not available for this session
captcha_project_not_set: Project not set, cannot use captcha
switch_use_prepare: Toggle whether to use Prepare logic (default recommended: off)
change_after_sale_begin_delay_prompt: Change delay after sale start, unit: milliseconds, default 0ms
status_code_meaning_content:
Status code meanings:
0: Order successful
-114514: BHYG internal reserved code, usually network issue
412: Single IP rate too fast, APIGW blocks IP temporarily
-401: GAIA global risk control
412: APIGW rate limit
100001: Rarely seen, possibly incomplete login
900001: Order verification shield (1s shield) or early order penalty
900002: Order verification shield traffic control
100009: Order verification layer stock insufficient
100009: Stock insufficient
100041: Early order → triggers 5min 900001 penalty after sale starts
100044: New captcha required
3: Order creation shield (5s shield)
221: Order creation layer flow control → triggers order creation shield
219: Order creation layer failed → triggers order creation shield
select_changfan_id_bind_type: Select real-name type for venue sales
select_changfan_id_bind_type_prompt: We cannot confirm the real-name requirement for venue sales, please manually confirm and choose (one order one ID and one ticket one ID have same effect)
set_ctoken_manually_prompt: Enter ctoken (leave empty to auto generate)
set_ptoken_manually_prompt: Enter ptoken (leave empty to auto generate)
change_delta_info: This setting is for fine-tuning dynamic rate deviation, default is usually fine
bws_not_bind: You have not bound a ticket
bws_ticket_no: Enter last 4 digits of ticket number
bws_code_75643: No purchase info found for current ID (75643)
bws_code_76645: Invitation users not supported for ticket authentication (76645)
bws_code_75639: ID used for ticket purchase already bound to another account (75639)
order_success_wait: Order successful. Please pay within 10 minutes. Press Ctrl + C for other operations. If no action in 10 minutes, will continue grabbing
only_lysk: This option only for Love and Deepspace related reservations
bws_get_rn_status_failed: Failed to get account real-name info: {message}
bws_rn_status_not_pass: Account real-name not passed or ID not supported
bws_rn_unknown: Don't know your gender, I'll let you in anyway
prefill_base_info: Prefill info exists: Session {screen} SKU {sku} Count {count} {buyer_info}
prefill_support: This project supports prefill. You can prefill in Bilibili APP and use one-click in BHYG
